prestazioni: FA24F 2.4L turbocharged boxer engine: Cobb Tuning Accessport V3 Stage 2+ tune with custom ethanol (E85) mapping for 380+ WHP, utilizing a Grimmspeed 3-port boost control solenoid and a Process West top-mount intercooler (TMIC) with integrated water spray kit for sustained power under heat-soak conditions

Full Tomei Powered EXPREME Ti exhaust system (cat-back) with 80mm titanium piping, paired with a custom unequal-length header (ULH) from HKS featuring 4-2-1 merge collectors and 1.75" primary tubes to optimize scavenging for the FA24F’s 5,000 RPM torque peak

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8-position adjustable compression/rebound damping, reinforced pillowball top mounts, and custom spring rates (8K front / 9K rear) to counteract the Levorg’s 55:45 weight distribution, paired with Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front / 22mm rear) and spherical end links for chassis rigidity
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Levorg-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, featuring integrated canards and a 30mm extended rear bumper lip to reduce lift at 180+ km/h

STI-branded Recaro Sportster CS bucket seats with custom Alcantara/Ultrasuede upholstery (black with red stitching) and Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses, replacing the OEM seats to save 12kg per seat while maintaining FIA compliance

Custom carbon fiber engine cover (FA24F-specific) from Seibon with a clear-coated weave finish, paired with a Cusco Type-RS strut tower bar (2-point, 25mm diameter) and a Pivot Racing carbon fiber rear strut brace to eliminate chassis flex under lateral G-forces
